subcodes.first_line: O Hadi! Through divine grace thou hast quaffed from the chalice of mystic knowledge and turned thy face toward the Most Exalted Horizon. That which now [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای هادی بعنایت الهی از کاس عرفان آشامیدی و بافق اعلی توجه نمودی آنچه حال
subcodes.subjects: @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @call to action
